outline.caption: Maximize your VA certifications with VASCO Assistant Pro. Streamline certification requests, centralize student data, automate compliance, and support student veterans with ease. Learn more and sign up for VASCO Assistant Pro today. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Automate Compliance,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
